{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Monarch-killing weapon
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|There is a [[Monarch-killing weapon]] on the line.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“And there’s a Monarch-killing weapon on the line.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
